## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new GrowthX team members and discuss Rapyd content strategy updates.](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New GrowthX team members introduced: Mara (Managing Director) and Vivek (Managing Editor)](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Atlas, GrowthX's new content platform, launched with improved AI capabilities and artifact management](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Rapyd team keen to optimize for AI search results (GEO) and increase online presence beyond the blog](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Need for more structured reporting to measure content performance and impact on pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)

## Topics

### Team Transitions

  - [Aida moving to new role onboarding clients; introduced Mara and Vivek as new Rapyd account leads](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Mara: Background in journalism, B2B content marketing for startups](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Vivek: Experience in fintech, institutional finance, and payment processing](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### Content Platform Update

  - [Switched to new Atlas platform with improved AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Artifacts (company context, audience personas, writing guidelines) now more modular and editable](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Enhanced fact-checking process in Atlas for improved accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [XML file generation for content publication being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

### Content Performance

  - [38% traffic growth in week 23, slight 9% decrease in week 24](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Positive month-over-month trend in search visibility (2% growth)](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [6 new keywords in top 3, 5 new in top 10](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Appearing in AI overviews with proportional growth in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

### Strategic Priorities

  - [AI optimization (GEO) for search results beyond traditional SEO](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
  - [Increasing overall internet presence (e.g., Medium, forums)](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Exploring ABM-focused content for specific use cases/clients](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Potential focus on FX as a growing area for Rapyd](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

### Reporting and Measurement

  - [Need for more structured reporting to track progress and impact on pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Current use of SEMrush for position tracking, but desire for more comprehensive analytics](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to consider Rapyd's feedback on AI optimization, increased online presence, and ABM-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Develop more structured reporting method for content performance and impact](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1690.0)
  - [Explore potential separate conversation about FX-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Continue refining artifacts in Atlas for improved content output](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Address XML file generation issues for smoother content publication process](https://fathom.video/share/kEHiSr7FGvHFpz2rVu5gcNruM3E-1-g8?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
